text:
There was a young boy named Leo who always wanted to fly. He dreamed of soaring through the sky, fighting dragons. His mommy said he would never learn to fly. His daddy said maybe he'd become a birdman.

One summer night, Leo saw a large bird outside his window. He thought maybe it could teach him.

He chased that bird. It was brave. It took flight. It flew circles around him.

Finally, Leo jumped. He hurt his knee pretty bad. Still, he soared. Hawks.

He found scales. A sea serpentine. Flight. He could do it!

But then a boat went by. Lots of noise. It chased him back.

Maybe next year.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
